location: Given by the NPC Kenneth Haight after clearing out Fort Haight for him, in Limgrave. A second copy is separately found on a corpse in a pit beneath a fire-spitting Gargoyle statue in Leyndell's sewers, northwest of the Avenue Balcony Site of Grace.
tactics: Find Kenneth Haight standing atop the ruined bridge between the Mistwood Outskirts and Third Church of Marika graces, and agree to clear Fort Haight for him.
After defeating the fort's enemies, rest at the Fort Haight West grace so he can invite you back, then return to him to be knighted and receive the dagger.
The Leyndell sewer copy is a separate, much later pickup — useful mainly if you skipped or missed Kenneth's quest earlier.
lore: A finely crafted dagger engraved with a grass crest, once carried by Erdtree royalty for personal defense in peacetime. Despite its craftsmanship it's an awkward weapon to wield, and unusually for a dagger its power grows with Faith rather than just Strength or Dexterity.

builds.name: Faith/Dex hybrid poke
builds.why: Even D scaling across Strength, Dexterity and Faith, plus a Faith-affinity bonus well above other infusion options, make it a solid faith-hybrid backup dagger.

builds.name: Early Flame Art/Sacred carrier
builds.why: Flame Art and Sacred affinities hit especially hard on this weapon, giving faith builds an early elemental dagger option.
